purchase_cant_make_payments: Your device is not allowed to make payments. Please verify your Parental Controls settings.
purchase_error_cancelled: Your purchase has encountered an error. Please verify your network connection and try again.
purchase_internet_required: Internet connection required to purchase product.
purchase_restore_failed_body: An error occured while restoring your transactions. Please verify your internet connection, check your iTunes account information, and try again.
purchase_unable_to_find_for_verify: Unable to find product to verify.
purchase_unable_to_verify_body: Your purchase could not be verified. Please try your purchase again when you have an internet connection or at a later time.
